serena_lsp: 23 tools stable R4-25. activate_project --project ~1.3s warm. find_symbol broad 70s+ (prefer Grep). Receiver methods need '(*Type).method'. Dynamic Workflow tool needs manual review — do audits directly via Grep/Read.

open_issues.sg25a1_R25: fmterrorfnoverbs (NEW 19th linter, registered cmd/linters/main.go:25/49, UNENFORCED). Flags fmt.Errorf with no-%-verb single string-literal arg0 -> errors.New. NO //nolint support (no BuildLineIndex) -> fix-to-zero is ONLY enforce path. 16 grep hits but ONLY 2 enforceable under default linux host build: pkg/workflow/utc_offset.go:18+24 (no build tag; fmt kept by Sprintf:27, add errors import). Other 14 wasm-only (*_wasm.go GOARCH=wasm, excluded from host golint-custom): console input(3)/list(1)/confirm(1)/select(2)/form(1) + parser/github_wasm(1) + workflow/git_helpers(1)+github_cli(4); wasm fix swaps fmt->errors import. Issue filed: fix utc_offset 2 sites (+optional 14 wasm parity) then append -fmterrorfnoverbs to cgo.yml:1040. Expect lands R26 (5th consec).
open_issues.sgbo1_defensible: 2 filepath.Join variants intentional: cli/git.go:303 trailing-slash, cli/fix_command.go:410 Separator-suffix.

completed_scans: Resolved+enforced: errstringmatch(R14) panicinlibrarycode(R19) manualmutexunlock/osexit/rawlog(R21) regexp/fprintln/strconv(R23) jsonmarshal(sg23a1 R24) uncheckedtypeassertion(sg24a1 R25, both ResultOf sites two-value). type_assert sg18a1 FIXED. fmt_errorf %w universal(1404). sync defer-Unlock universal. octal 57(R8). DEFER: largefunc(>60)/excessivefuncparams(>8) R5-6 17fn/11fn refactor-heavy unfiled; ctxbackground 28 sites unfiled. DO-NOT-REFILE (dismissed): ossetenvlibrary 10, contextcancelnotdeferred 6, fileclosenotdeferred zero-prod.

patterns.ci_enforce: cgo.yml:1040 POSITIVE LINTER_FLAGS. R25=10 flags: -errstringmatch -panicinlibrarycode -manualmutexunlock -osexitinlibrary -rawloginlib -regexpcompileinfunction -fprintlnsprintf -strconvparseignorederror -jsonmarshalignoredeerror -uncheckedtypeassertion. Append for zero-vio; refactor///nolint first for non-zero.
patterns.enforce_landed_4consec: PROVEN R22->R23->R24->R25: audit registered-but-unenforced linter -> fix-to-zero -> file enforce issue = HIGHEST-ROI, lands within the week. Re-filing dismissed prod-site issues does NOT land. Frame as 'fix N trivial sites then enforce', NOT 'refactor N sites'.
patterns.wasm_build_tag: *_wasm.go files carry IMPLICIT GOARCH=wasm constraint via filename (no //go:build needed). Host (linux) golint-custom EXCLUDES them. So enforce-readiness counts ONLY non-wasm-tagged violations. Inverse for linux-only files. Always partition grep hits by build constraint before claiming 'N enforceable'.
patterns.self_consistency: Linter framework's own analyzers should pass enforced linters. sg24a1 (2 newest analyzers regressed two-value ResultOf) was clean landable ask — RESOLVED R25.

linters_R25.enforced_10: errstringmatch panicinlibrarycode manualmutexunlock osexitinlibrary rawloginlib regexpcompileinfunction fprintlnsprintf strconvparseignorederror jsonmarshalignoredeerror uncheckedtypeassertion
linters_R25.unenforced_9: contextcancelnotdeferred(dismissed) ctxbackground(28,refactor) errormessage(opt-in) excessivefuncparams(refactor) fileclosenotdeferred(zero,dismissed) largefunc(refactor) ossetenvlibrary(dismissed) ssljson(not-go-code) fmterrorfnoverbs(sg25a1 filed)
linters_R25.next_candidates: Reverify sg25a1 R26. After it lands, clean enforce candidates again EXHAUSTED unless 20th linter appears (registry grew 18->19 this run, ~1/few-runs). Pivot R26+: (a) errormessage opt-in scope, (b) ctxbackground 28-site scoped refactor proposal, (c) fmterrorfnoverbs lacks //nolint support — possible follow-up to add BuildLineIndex for parity with siblings.

bash_policy: Sandbox blocks: multi-stmt compounds, mkdir/ls/find-exec/wc/cat/sed outside repo, for-loops, backtick grep (cmd subst), heredoc, git on /tmp. go build blocked (lint via Grep/Read). gh issue/search list --json 'Malformed version:'; gh api search/issues label query returns null items — open-issue check unreliable, rely on memory+7d expiry. Glob/Read/Write work on /tmp; bash CANNOT write/read /tmp/gh-aw/repo-memory (use Write/Edit; append via Edit on unique tail). /tmp/gh-aw/agent/ bash-writable. safeoutputs `. < file.json`. KEEP MEMORY FILES SMALL — 10KB patch limit; prefer Edit over full Write rewrites.
